value.name: New Order
value.subject: [Order Baru] {{.order_number}} - {{.business_name}}
value.body: Halo Admin, order baru {{.order_number}} dengan total {{.currency}} {{.grand_total}} baru saja dibuat.

description: Template notifikasi admin saat order baru masuk (Indonesia)

value.name: Cancelled Order
value.subject: [Order Dibatalkan] {{.order_number}}
value.body: Order {{.order_number}} dibatalkan. Status order saat ini: {{.order_status}}.

description: Template notifikasi admin saat order dibatalkan (Indonesia)

value.name: Failed Order
value.subject: [Payment Gagal] {{.order_number}}
value.body: Payment untuk order {{.order_number}} gagal atau ditolak. Status payment: {{.payment_status}}.

description: Template notifikasi admin saat payment gagal (Indonesia)

value.name: Processing Order
value.subject: Order kamu sedang diproses - {{.order_number}}
value.body: Hi {{.customer_name}}, order {{.order_number}} sudah kami terima dan pembayaran sudah terverifikasi.

description: Template notifikasi customer saat order mulai diproses (Indonesia)

value.name: Completed Order
value.subject: Order selesai - {{.order_number}}
value.body: Hi {{.customer_name}}, order {{.order_number}} sudah selesai. Terima kasih sudah belanja.

description: Template notifikasi customer saat order selesai (Indonesia)

value.name: Delivery Status Changed
value.subject: [Delivery] {{.order_number}} berubah ke {{.delivery_status}}

description: Template notifikasi customer saat status delivery berubah (Indonesia)

value.name: Customer Forgot Password
value.subject: Reset password akun GoSeller
value.body: Halo {{.customer_name}}, kami menerima permintaan reset password. Klik tautan berikut untuk melanjutkan: {{.reset_url}}. Tautan ini berlaku 15 menit.

description: Template reset password customer (Indonesia)

value.name: Member Forgot Password
value.subject: Reset password akun member GoSeller
value.body: Halo {{.member_name}}, kami menerima permintaan reset password untuk akun member kamu. Klik tautan berikut untuk melanjutkan: {{.reset_url}}. Tautan ini berlaku 15 menit.

description: Template reset password member (Indonesia)

value.name: Proof Uploaded
value.subject: [Bukti Transfer Baru] {{.order_number}}
value.body: Bukti transfer baru sudah diupload untuk order {{.order_number}}. Silakan cek panel admin.

description: Template notifikasi admin saat bukti transfer diupload (Indonesia)

value.name: Member Setup Admin
value.subject: [Member Baru] {{.full_name}} - {{.business_name}}
value.body: Member baru berhasil dibuat. Nama: {{.full_name}} | Email: {{.member_email}} | Business: {{.business_name}} ({{.business_slug}}) | Status: {{.setup_status}}. Menunggu verifikasi email.

description: Template notifikasi admin saat member baru berhasil dibuat (Indonesia)

value.name: Member Setup Member
value.subject: Verifikasi email akun member - {{.business_name}}
value.body: Halo {{.full_name}}, akun member kamu sudah dibuat untuk business {{.business_name}}. Silakan verifikasi email lewat {{.activation_url}}. Setelah itu login via {{.login_url}} menggunakan email dan password yang kamu buat saat setup.

description: Template email onboarding member setelah setup berhasil (Indonesia)

value.name: Member Setup Failed
value.subject: [Member Setup Gagal] {{.full_name}}
value.body: Setup member gagal untuk {{.full_name}} ({{.member_email}}) pada business {{.business_name}}. Status: {{.setup_status}}. Pesan: {{.setup_message}}.

description: Template notifikasi admin saat setup member gagal (Indonesia)

value.name: Team Member Invited
value.subject: [Undangan Tim] {{.business_name}}
value.body: Halo {{.member_name}}, kamu diundang oleh {{.invited_by_label}} {{.invited_by_name}} untuk bergabung ke {{.business_name}} sebagai {{.role}}. Klik tautan berikut untuk menerima undangan: {{.invite_url}}.

description: Template email undangan ke member saat diundang ke tim (Indonesia)

value.name: Team Member Suspended
value.subject: [Akses Ditangguhkan] {{.business_name}}
value.body: Halo {{.member_name}}, akses team kamu di {{.business_name}} telah ditangguhkan. Alasan: {{.reason}}. Jika ini terasa keliru, silakan hubungi tim yang mengundangmu.

description: Template email ke member saat akses team ditangguhkan (Indonesia)

value.name: New Order
value.subject: [New Order] {{.order_number}} - {{.business_name}}
value.body: Hello Admin, new order {{.order_number}} with total {{.currency}} {{.grand_total}} has just been created.

description: Admin notification template when a new order is created (English)

value.name: Cancelled Order
value.subject: [Order Cancelled] {{.order_number}}
value.body: Order {{.order_number}} has been cancelled. Current order status: {{.order_status}}.

description: Admin notification template when an order is cancelled (English)

value.name: Failed Order
value.subject: [Payment Failed] {{.order_number}}
value.body: Payment for order {{.order_number}} failed or was rejected. Payment status: {{.payment_status}}.

description: Admin notification template when payment fails (English)

value.name: Processing Order
value.subject: Your order is being processed - {{.order_number}}
value.body: Hi {{.customer_name}}, your order {{.order_number}} has been received and your payment has been verified.

description: Customer notification template when order starts processing (English)

value.name: Completed Order
value.subject: Order completed - {{.order_number}}
value.body: Hi {{.customer_name}}, your order {{.order_number}} is completed. Thank you for shopping with us.

description: Customer notification template when order is completed (English)

value.name: Delivery Status Changed
value.subject: [Delivery] {{.order_number}} changed to {{.delivery_status}}

description: Customer notification template when delivery status changes (English)

value.name: Customer Forgot Password
value.subject: Reset GoSeller account password
value.body: Hi {{.customer_name}}, we received a password reset request for your account. Click this link to continue: {{.reset_url}}. This link is valid for 15 minutes.

description: Customer password reset template (English)

value.name: Member Forgot Password
value.subject: Reset GoSeller member account password
value.body: Hi {{.member_name}}, we received a password reset request for your member account. Click this link to continue: {{.reset_url}}. This link is valid for 15 minutes.

description: Member password reset template (English)

value.name: Proof Uploaded
value.subject: [New Transfer Proof] {{.order_number}}
value.body: A new transfer proof has been uploaded for order {{.order_number}}. Please check the admin panel.

description: Admin notification template when payment proof is uploaded (English)

value.name: Member Setup Admin
value.subject: [New Member] {{.full_name}} - {{.business_name}}
value.body: A new member has been created. Name: {{.full_name}} | Email: {{.member_email}} | Business: {{.business_name}} ({{.business_slug}}) | Status: {{.setup_status}}. Waiting for email verification.

description: Admin notification template when a new member is created (English)

value.name: Member Setup Member
value.subject: Verify your member email - {{.business_name}}
value.body: Hi {{.full_name}}, your member account for {{.business_name}} is ready. Please verify your email via {{.activation_url}}. After that, login via {{.login_url}} using the email and password you created during setup.

description: Member onboarding email after setup success (English)

value.name: Member Setup Failed
value.subject: [Member Setup Failed] {{.full_name}}
value.body: Member setup failed for {{.full_name}} ({{.member_email}}) in {{.business_name}}. Status: {{.setup_status}}. Message: {{.setup_message}}.

description: Admin notification template when member setup fails (English)

value.name: Team Member Invited
value.subject: [Team Invite] {{.business_name}}
value.body: Hi {{.member_name}}, you have been invited by {{.invited_by_label}} {{.invited_by_name}} to join {{.business_name}} as {{.role}}. Click here to accept the invitation: {{.invite_url}}.

description: Member invitation email template when a team member is invited (English)

value.name: Team Member Suspended
value.subject: [Access Suspended] {{.business_name}}
value.body: Hi {{.member_name}}, your team access for {{.business_name}} has been suspended. Reason: {{.reason}}. If you think this is a mistake, please contact the inviter.

description: Member email template when a team member is suspended (English)

value.name: Subscription Confirmation
value.subject: Konfirmasi langganan - {{.business_name}}
value.body:
Hai {{.Name}},

Terima kasih telah berlangganan {{.business_name}}{{if .ProductName}} - {{.ProductName}}{{end}}.
Silakan klik tautan berikut untuk mengonfirmasi langganan Anda:
{{.ConfirmLink}}

Tautan ini akan kedaluwarsa dalam {{.ExpiryMinutes}} menit.

Jika Anda tidak meminta ini, abaikan saja.

description: Template konfirmasi langganan customer (Indonesia)

value.name: Subscription Confirmation
value.subject: Subscription confirmation - {{.business_name}}
value.body:
Hi {{.Name}},

Thanks for subscribing to {{.business_name}}{{if .ProductName}} - {{.ProductName}}{{end}}.
Please click the link below to confirm your subscription:
{{.ConfirmLink}}

This link will expire in {{.ExpiryMinutes}} minutes.

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

description: Subscription confirmation template (English)

value.name: Customer Email Verification
value.subject: Verifikasi email akun - {{.business_name}}
value.body:
Halo {{.customer_name}},

Terima kasih telah mendaftar. Silakan verifikasi email Anda dengan mengeklik tautan berikut:
{{.activation_url}}

Tautan ini akan kedaluwarsa dalam {{.ExpiryMinutes}} menit.

Jika Anda tidak meminta ini, abaikan saja.

description: Template verifikasi email customer saat pendaftaran (Indonesia)

value.name: Customer Email Verification
value.subject: Verify your email - {{.business_name}}
value.body:
Hi {{.customer_name}},

Thanks for signing up. Please verify your email by clicking the link below:
{{.activation_url}}

This link will expire in {{.ExpiryMinutes}} minutes.

If you did not request this, please ignore this email.

description: Customer email verification template (English)
